summary: Frontend-only testing of 3 new homepage sections: RegulatoryRealitySection, AuthorityClockSection, SystemArchitectureSection. All sections render correctly with proper content, data-testid attributes, section ordering, and visual styling.

ui_bugs.issue: CountUp animation strips '+' suffix from '10+' stat. After animation completes, display shows '10' instead of '10+'. Code: isPercent check only handles '%', does not handle '+' suffix.

action_items: Fix CountUp component to preserve '+' suffix: add `const isPlus = target.includes('+')` and append '+' to display value when isPlus is true. Similar to how '%' is handled.
critical_code_review_comments: CountUp in RegulatoryRealitySection.jsx: only handles '%' suffix, not '+'. Fix: add `const isPlus = target.endsWith('+')` and `setDisplay(isPercent ? ... : isPlus ? current + '+' : String(current))`
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new sections (regulatory-reality-section, authority-clock-section, system-architecture-section) are working. Section order correct: Hero→RegulatoryReality(y=1184)→AuthorityClock(y=2123)→FourPillars→SystemDiagram→PhilosophicalLine→SystemArchitecture(y=5704). All data-testids present. Clock stages 0-3 have correct border colors (DAY1=gold rgb(197,160,89), DAYS60-90=amber rgba(197,130,89,0.7)). Only issue: CountUp drops '+' from '10+'.
rca_of_issue: CountUp component parses target with `parseInt(target.replace(/\D/g, ''), 10)` which strips all non-digits, then only re-adds '%' if target included '%'. For '10+', the '+' is stripped and not restored. Fix: check for '+' suffix same way '%' is checked.
